summary: Good audience‑FOB recording that captures a sweet first set highlighted by “Eternity” and “So Many Roads.”
review: The tape, recorded with an AMS placed in the center aisle, delivers clear, listenable sound despite being a front‑of‑house capture. Reviewers rave about the first set’s jamming – especially the extended “Eternity” and the extra‑sweet rendition of “So Many Roads” – while the second set remains undocumented for this source.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive comments on both performance (first‑set highlights) and recording setup, but limited detail about the second set and overall sound quality keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: AMS recorder positioned in center aisle gave a clear front‑of‑house capture; no complaints of muddiness or dropouts.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for strong jams and sweet moments; second set not covered in the available reviews.
